title: vertical-slice decomposition of a feature
invocation_hint: Invoke SKI-PRO-1002 (vertical-slice-decomposition) and decompose the feature below into shippable slices.
task_description: Decompose 'in-app notification banner with opt-in settings + 30-day retention + dismiss-once persistence' into vertical slices. Each slice must be independently shippable, observable in production, and ordered by smallest-first.
